supported_devices: Gavita LED e-series fixtures, Titan Controls environmental sensors (VPD, VWC, EC)
port_types: RJ10 4P4C (2x luminaire communication), 3.5mm (2x temperature probe), USB-A (firmware update/data transfer), Debug port, Reset key
compatible_lights: Gavita 1930e, RS 1900e, RS 2400e, 1700e, 900e LED e-series, Sun System 1850 LED fixtures
compatible_sensors: Titan Controls Tali VPD Sensor, Titan Controls Triton Substrate Sensor (up to 16 sensors total, sold separately; Gavita EL3-to-Titan Sensor Adapter Cable required)
recommended_use_note: Large-scale commercial LED grow operations; 8-inch touchscreen with full grow-cycle scheduling across 2 independent zones (up to 256 fixtures each)
uvp_notes: US market pricing in USD; no EU/German EUR pricing found. MSRP ~$999, current sale prices range $709–$779. Product appears primarily US market — EU availability not confirmed.
notes: LED-only controller; does not support traditional HPS bus directly. Humidity/VPD/substrate monitoring requires optional Titan Controls sensors (Tali VPD, Triton Substrate). Control output: 0-10V analog + digital. Third-party control input: 0–11.5V. Input: 100–240V AC, 50/60Hz, 1.5A; controller input 15Vdc 3A. Max cascade distance 800m. Two independent zones, 256 fixtures each. IP20. ETL/FCC certified (US certifications only; EU/CE status not confirmed). Includes mounting plate, power adapter, 2 temperature probes (5m), 2 luminaire cables (5m), RJ10 cables, 8GB USB flash drive, quick-start guide. SKU: HGC906174.
